title: Analytics - Fit Test Competed
scenario: Verify that after completing the Fit Test on mobile, the Firebase page displays default elements and updated event counts.
steps: Log in to the Firebase console and navigate to the relevant project.
Open the Firebase page and verify it loads properly.

Check that the page contains default elements: Graph, Events in last 30 minutes, Event count by Country, Event count by Gender, Events per session, App Version, App build, App Environment, and Device PID.
Complete the Fit Test on the mobile device.
Wait a few hours for event counts to be updated.
Check that the event count for related elements has increased.
expected: The Firebase page opens properly and displays all default elements. After completing the Fit Test on mobile and waiting a few hours, the event count for related elements increases.
